heading: Hindmarsh Tiers vs Holden Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hindmarsh Tiers, South Australia and Holden Hill, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hindmarsh Tiers and Holden Hill have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Hindmarsh Tiers or Holden Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hindmarsh Tiers has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Holden Hill scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hindmarsh Tiers scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Holden Hill scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hindmarsh Tiers or Holden Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hindmarsh Tiers has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
